title: SOPHIAS smartwatch heart-rate schema
description: Schema for raw heart-rate data collected from Fitbit Sense smartwatches through Watch-DMLT during a presentation session. Each record contains a local datetime string, a UNIX timestamp for synchronization, and the heart-rate value measured in beats per minute.

Fecha.description: Local date and time at which the heart-rate sample was recorded, stored as a human-readable datetime string.

Timestamp.description: UNIX timestamp associated with the heart-rate sample, expressed in milliseconds. This field can be used to align the smartwatch signal with other timestamped SOPHIAS modalities.

Heart Rate.description: Heart-rate value measured by the Fitbit Sense smartwatch for the corresponding participant role at the recorded timestamp.
